nasb.text: that He will give the rain for your land in its season, the early and late rain, that you may gather in your grain and your new wine and your oil.

esv.text: he will give the rain for your land in its season, the early rain and the later rain, that you may gather in your grain and your wine and your oil.

cnv.text: 他必按時降雨在你們的地上，就是降秋雨和春雨，使你們可以豐收五穀、新酒和新油。

ccb.text: 祂就会按时降下秋雨和春雨，使你们收获谷物、新酒和油，
